hints.DERIVATIVE: Measures how a function changes; the slope of a curve
hints.LIMIT: The value a function approaches as input gets close to something
hints.FUNCTION: A rule that maps each input to exactly one output
hints.NEWTON: English co-inventor of calculus and discoverer of gravity
hints.LEIBNIZ: German co-inventor of calculus; gave us the dx notation
hints.EULER: Prolific Swiss mathematician; introduced the constant e
hints.GAUSS: Prince of mathematicians; brilliant in number theory
hints.DELTA: Greek letter for 'change in' a quantity
hints.EPSILON: Greek letter often used for a tiny positive number
hints.LAMBDA: Greek letter used for eigenvalues and wavelengths
hints.PHI: Greek letter for the golden ratio
